name: Cashew "Whipped Cream
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Raw cashews or cashew pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the raw cashews and water until a thick cream forms.
2. Slowly add the oil in a fine stream, blending continuously. The mixture will become very thick. If needed, add more oil to achieve the desired consistency.
3. Stir in the maple syrup, vanilla extract, and salt.
4. Chill before serving. This recipe yields approximately 2.5 cups.
